/**
     * Adds an OLE object to the current document position.
     * @memberof Api
	 * @alias AddOleObject
	 * @this Api
     * @param {Object} data - The OLE object properties.
     * @param {string} data.data - OLE object data (internal format).
     * @param {string} data.imgSrc - A link to the image (its visual representation) stored in the OLE object and used by the plugin.
     * @param {string} data.guid - An identifier of the plugin which can edit the current OLE object and must be of the *asc.{UUID}* type.
     * @param {number} data.width - The OLE object width measured in millimeters.
     * @param {number} data.height - The OLE object height measured in millimeters.
     * @param {number} data.widthPix - The OLE object image width in pixels.
     * @param {number} data.heightPix - The OLE object image height in pixels.
    */
description: Adds an OLE object to the current document position.

params.description: The OLE object properties.
params.name: data

params.description: OLE object data (internal format).
params.name: data.data

params.description: A link to the image (its visual representation) stored in the OLE object and used by the plugin.
params.name: data.imgSrc

params.description: An identifier of the plugin which can edit the current OLE object and must be of the *asc.{UUID}* type.
params.name: data.guid

params.description: The OLE object width measured in millimeters.
params.name: data.width

params.description: The OLE object height measured in millimeters.
params.name: data.height

params.description: The OLE object image width in pixels.
params.name: data.widthPix

params.description: The OLE object image height in pixels.
params.name: data.heightPix

name: AddOleObject

If no error occurs, then an empty string is passed. */
description: Specifies the end action for long operations.

comment: /** * Encrypts the document. * @memberof Api * @alias OnEncryption * @param {object} obj - The encryption properties. * @param {string} obj.type - The type of encrypting operation: * * generatePassword - generates a password for the document, * * getPasswordByFile - sends the password when opening the document, * * encryptData - encrypts changes when co-editing, * * decryptData - decrypts changes when co-editing. * @param {string} obj.password - A string value specifying the password to access the document. * @param {string} obj.data - Encrypted/decrypted changes. * @param {boolean} obj.check - Checks if the encryption/decryption operation is successful or not (used only for *encryptData* or *decryptData* types). * @param {string} obj.docinfo - An unencrypted part of the encrypted file. * @param {string} obj.hash - A string value specifying a file hash (*sha256* by default). * @param {string} obj.error - A string value specifying an error that occurs (the "" value means that the operation is successful). */
description: Encrypts the document.

params.description: The encryption properties.
params.name: obj

params.description: The type of encrypting operation: * generatePassword - generates a password for the document, * getPasswordByFile - sends the password when opening the document, * encryptData - encrypts changes when co-editing, * decryptData - decrypts changes when co-editing.
params.name: obj.type

params.description: A string value specifying the password to access the document.
params.name: obj.password

params.description: Encrypted/decrypted changes.
params.name: obj.data

params.description: Checks if the encryption/decryption operation is successful or not (used only for *encryptData* or *decryptData* types).
params.name: obj.check

params.description: An unencrypted part of the encrypted file.
params.name: obj.docinfo

params.description: A string value specifying a file hash (*sha256* by default).
params.name: obj.hash

params.description: A string value specifying an error that occurs (the "" value means that the operation is successful).
params.name: obj.error

name: OnEncryption

/**

     * @memberof Api
     * @alias SetProperties
     * @param {object} obj - The document properties.
	 * @param {?boolean} obj.copyoutenabled - Disables copying from the editor if it is set to **false**.
	 * @param {?boolean} obj.hideContentControlTrack - Disables tracking the content control if it is set to **true**.
	 * @param {?string} obj.watermark_on_draw - A string value for {@link global#watermark_on_draw watermark properties} in JSON format.
     * @param {?boolean} obj.disableAutostartMacros - Sets a flag that specifies that macros are started automatically when the editor opens.
     * @param {?string} obj.fillForms - Sets rules in JSON format for filling document {@link global#fillForms forms} by tags.
     */
description: Sets the properties to the document.

params.description: Disables copying from the editor if it is set to **false**.

params.description: Disables tracking the content control if it is set to **true**.
params.name: obj.hideContentControlTrack

params.description: A string value for {@link global#watermark_on_draw watermark properties} in JSON format.
params.name: obj.watermark_on_draw

params.description: Sets a flag that specifies that macros are started automatically when the editor opens.
params.name: obj.disableAutostartMacros

params.description: Sets rules in JSON format for filling document {@link global#fillForms forms} by tags.
params.name: obj.fillForms

name: SetProperties

/**
     * Returns the selected text from the document.
     * @memberof Api
     * @alias GetSelectedText
     * @param {object} prop - The resulting string display properties.
     * @param {boolean} prop.NewLine - Defines if the resulting string will include line boundaries or not (they will be replaced with '\r').
     * @param {boolean} prop.NewLineParagraph - Defines if the resulting string will include paragraph line boundaries or not.
     * @param {boolean} prop.Numbering - Defines if the resulting string will include numbering or not.
     * @param {boolean} prop.Math - Defines if the resulting string will include mathematical expressions or not.
     * @param {string} prop.TableCellSeparator - Defines how the table cell separator will be specified in the resulting string.
     * @param {string} prop.TableRowSeparator - Defines how the table row separator will be specified in the resulting string.
     * @param {string} prop.ParaSeparator - Defines how the paragraph separator will be specified in the resulting string.
     * @param {string} prop.TabSymbol - Defines how the tab will be specified in the resulting string.
     * @param {string} prop.NewLineSeparator - Defines how the line separator will be specified in the resulting string (this property has the priority over *NewLine*).
	 * @return {string} - Selected text.
     * @since 7.1.0
     * @example
     * window.Asc.plugin.executeMethod("GetSelectedText", [{NewLine:true, NewLineParagraph:true, Numbering:true}])
     */
description: Returns the selected text from the document.

params.description: The resulting string display properties.
params.name: prop

params.description: Defines if the resulting string will include line boundaries or not (they will be replaced with '\r').
params.name: prop.NewLine

params.description: Defines if the resulting string will include paragraph line boundaries or not.
params.name: prop.NewLineParagraph

params.description: Defines if the resulting string will include numbering or not.
params.name: prop.Numbering

params.description: Defines if the resulting string will include mathematical expressions or not.
params.name: prop.Math

params.description: Defines how the table cell separator will be specified in the resulting string.
params.name: prop.TableCellSeparator

params.description: Defines how the table row separator will be specified in the resulting string.
params.name: prop.TableRowSeparator

params.description: Defines how the paragraph separator will be specified in the resulting string.
params.name: prop.ParaSeparator

params.description: Defines how the tab will be specified in the resulting string.
params.name: prop.TabSymbol

params.description: Defines how the line separator will be specified in the resulting string (this property has the priority over *NewLine*).
params.name: prop.NewLineSeparator

name: GetSelectedText

/**
     * Replaces the first selected drawing with the image specified in the parameters.
     * If there are no drawings selected, the method inserts the image at the current position.
     * @memberof Api
     * @alias PutImageDataToSelection
     * @param {ImageData} oImageData - The information about the base64 encoded *png* image.
     * @since 7.2.0
     */
description:
Replaces the first selected drawing with the image specified in the parameters.
If there are no drawings selected, the method inserts the image at the current position.

params.name: oImageData

     * @global
     * @class
     * @name Api
     */
description: Base class.
name: Api

comment:
/**
	 * @typedef {Object} CommentData
	 * The comment data.
	 * @property {string} UserName - The comment author.
	 * @property {string} QuoteText - The quote comment text.
	 * @property {string} Text - The comment text.
	 * @property {string} Time - The time when the comment was posted (in milliseconds).
	 * @property {boolean} Solved - Specifies if the comment is resolved (**true**) or not (**false**).
	 * @property {CommentData[]} Replies - An array containing the comment replies represented as the *CommentData* object.
	 */
name: CommentData
description: The comment data.

properties.description: The comment author.
properties.name: UserName

properties.description: The quote comment text.
properties.name: QuoteText

properties.description: The comment text.
properties.name: Text

properties.description: The time when the comment was posted (in milliseconds).
properties.name: Time

properties.description: Specifies if the comment is resolved (**true**) or not (**false**).
properties.name: Solved

properties.description: An array containing the comment replies represented as the *CommentData* object.
properties.name: Replies

comment:
/**
	 * Adds a comment to the presentation.
	 * @memberof Api
	 * @alias AddComment
	 * @param {CommentData}  oCommentData - An object which contains the comment data.
	 * @return {string | null} - The comment ID in the string format or null if the comment cannot be added.
	 * @since 7.3.0
	 */
description: Adds a comment to the presentation.

params.description: An object which contains the comment data.
params.name: oCommentData

returns.description: - The comment ID in the string format or null if the comment cannot be added.

name: AddComment

comment:
/**
	 * Changes the specified comment.
	 * @memberof Api
	 * @alias ChangeComment
	 * @param {string} sId - The comment ID.
	 * @param {CommentData} oCommentData - An object which contains the new comment data.
	 * @return {boolean}
	 * @since 7.3.0
	 */
description: Changes the specified comment.

params.description: The comment ID.
params.name: sId

params.description: An object which contains the new comment data.
params.name: oCommentData

name: ChangeComment

comment:
/**
	 * Removes the specified comments.
	 * @param {string[]} arrIds - An array which contains the IDs of the specified comments.
	 * @memberof Api
	 * @alias RemoveComments
	 * @since 7.3.0
	 */
description: Removes the specified comments.

params.description: An array which contains the IDs of the specified comments.
params.name: arrIds

name: RemoveComments

comment:
/**
	 * Starts the presentation slide show.
	 * @memberof Api
	 * @alias StartSlideShow
	 * @since 8.0.0
	 */
description: Starts the presentation slide show.
name: StartSlideShow

comment:
/**
	 * Pauses the current slide show.
	 * @memberof Api
	 * @alias PauseSlideShow
	 * @since 8.0.0
	 */
description: Pauses the current slide show.
name: PauseSlideShow

comment:
/**
	 * Resumes the current slide show.
	 * @memberof Api
	 * @alias ResumeSlideShow
	 * @since 8.0.0
	 */
description: Resumes the current slide show.
name: ResumeSlideShow

comment:
/**
	 * Ends the current slide show.
	 * @memberof Api
	 * @alias EndSlideShow
	 * @since 8.0.0
	 */
description: Ends the current slide show.
name: EndSlideShow

comment:
/**
	 * Displays the slide following the current slide in the slide show.
	 * @memberof Api
	 * @alias GoToNextSlideInSlideShow
	 * @since 8.0.0
	 */
description: Displays the slide following the current slide in the slide show.
name: GoToNextSlideInSlideShow

comment:
/**
	 * Displays the slide following the current slide in the slide show.
	 * @memberof Api
	 * @alias GoToPreviousSlideInSlideShow
	 * @since 8.0.0
	 */
description: Displays the slide following the current slide in the slide show.
name: GoToPreviousSlideInSlideShow

comment:
/**
	 * Displays the slide with the specific index.
	 * @memberof Api
	 * @alias GoToSlideInSlideShow
	 * @param {number} nSlideIndex - The slide index.
	 * @since 8.0.0
	 */
description: Displays the slide with the specific index.

params.description: The slide index.
params.name: nSlideIndex

name: GoToSlideInSlideShow

comment:
/**
     * Base class
     * @global
     * @class
     * @name Api
     */
description: Base class
name: Api

comment: /** * An object containing the font information. * @typedef {Object} FontInfo * @property {string} m_wsFontName The font name. * @property {string} m_wsFontPath The path to the file with the current font. * @property {number} m_lIndex The font number in the file if there is more than one font in the file. * @property {boolean} m_bBold Specifies if the font characters are bold or not. * @property {boolean} m_bItalic Specifies if the font characters are italic or not. * @property {boolean} m_bIsFixed Specifies if the current font is monospaced or not. * @property {Array.} m_aPanose The PANOSE Typeface Classification Number, a compact 10-byte description of the font critical visual characteristics, such as contrast, weight, and serif style. * @property {number} m_ulUnicodeRange1 The Unicode range encompassed by the font file (Bits 0-31). * @property {number} m_ulUnicodeRange2 The Unicode range encompassed by the font file (Bits 32-63). * @property {number} m_ulUnicodeRange3 The Unicode range encompassed by the font file (Bits 64-95). * @property {number} m_ulUnicodeRange4 The Unicode range encompassed by the font file (Bits 96-127). * @property {number} m_ulCodePageRange1 The code pages encompassed by the font file (Bits 0-31). * @property {number} m_ulCodePageRange2 The code pages encompassed by the font file (Bits 32-63). * @property {number} m_usWeigth The visual weight (stroke blackness or thickness) of the font characters (1-1000). * @property {number} m_usWidth The relative change from the normal aspect ratio (width to height ratio). * @property {number} m_sFamilyClass The font family class which values are assigned by IBM to each font family. * @property {number} m_eFontFormat The specific file type(s) used to store font data: 0 - *.fon, 1 - *.ttf, 2 - *.ttf, *.otf (CFF), 3 - unknown font format. * @property {number} m_shAvgCharWidth The arithmetic average of the escapement (width) of all non-zero width glyphs in the font. * @property {number} m_shAscent The height above the baseline for a clipping region. * @property {number} m_shDescent The vertical extent below the baseline for a clipping region. * @property {number} m_shLineGap The typographic line gap for the current font. * @property {number} m_shXHeight The distance between the baseline and the approximate height of non-ascending lowercase letters measured in FUnits. * @property {number} m_shCapHeight The distance between the baseline and the approximate height of uppercase letters measured in FUnits. */
description: An object containing the font information.
name: FontInfo

properties.description: The font name.
properties.name: m_wsFontName

properties.description: The path to the file with the current font.
properties.name: m_wsFontPath

properties.description: The font number in the file if there is more than one font in the file.
properties.name: m_lIndex

properties.description: Specifies if the font characters are bold or not.
properties.name: m_bBold

properties.description: Specifies if the font characters are italic or not.
properties.name: m_bItalic

properties.description: Specifies if the current font is monospaced or not.
properties.name: m_bIsFixed

properties.description: The PANOSE Typeface Classification Number, a compact 10-byte description of the font critical visual characteristics, such as contrast, weight, and serif style.
properties.name: m_aPanose

properties.description: The Unicode range encompassed by the font file (Bits 0-31).
properties.name: m_ulUnicodeRange1

properties.description: The Unicode range encompassed by the font file (Bits 32-63).
properties.name: m_ulUnicodeRange2

properties.description: The Unicode range encompassed by the font file (Bits 64-95).
properties.name: m_ulUnicodeRange3

properties.description: The Unicode range encompassed by the font file (Bits 96-127).
properties.name: m_ulUnicodeRange4

properties.description: The code pages encompassed by the font file (Bits 0-31).
properties.name: m_ulCodePageRange1

properties.description: The code pages encompassed by the font file (Bits 32-63).
properties.name: m_ulCodePageRange2

properties.description: The visual weight (stroke blackness or thickness) of the font characters (1-1000).
properties.name: m_usWeigth

properties.description: The relative change from the normal aspect ratio (width to height ratio).
properties.name: m_usWidth

properties.description: The font family class which values are assigned by IBM to each font family.
properties.name: m_sFamilyClass

properties.description: The specific file type(s) used to store font data: 0 - *.fon, 1 - *.ttf, 2 - *.ttf, *.otf (CFF), 3 - unknown font format.
properties.name: m_eFontFormat

properties.description: The arithmetic average of the escapement (width) of all non-zero width glyphs in the font.
properties.name: m_shAvgCharWidth

properties.description: The height above the baseline for a clipping region.
properties.name: m_shAscent

properties.description: The vertical extent below the baseline for a clipping region.
properties.name: m_shDescent

properties.description: The typographic line gap for the current font.
properties.name: m_shLineGap

properties.description: The distance between the baseline and the approximate height of non-ascending lowercase letters measured in FUnits.
properties.name: m_shXHeight

properties.description: The distance between the baseline and the approximate height of uppercase letters measured in FUnits.
properties.name: m_shCapHeight

comment:
/**
     * An object containing the data about all the macros from the document.
     * @typedef {Object} Macros
     * @property {Array.<string>} macrosArray - An array of macros codes (*[{"name": "Macros1", "value": "{macrosCode}"}]*).
     * @property {number} current - A current macro index.
     */
description: An object containing the data about all the macros from the document.
name: Macros

properties.description: An array of macros codes (*[{"name": "Macros1", "value": "{macrosCode}"}]*).
properties.name: macrosArray

properties.description: A current macro index.
properties.name: current

comment:
/**
	 * The current selection type ("none", "text", "drawing", or "slide").
	 * @typedef {("none" | "text" | "drawing" | "slide")} SelectionType
	 */
description: The current selection type ("none", "text", "drawing", or "slide").
name: SelectionType

comment:
/**
     * An object containing the information about the base64 encoded *png* image.
     * @typedef {Object} ImageData
     * @property {string} src The image source in the base64 format.
     * @property {number} width The image width in pixels.
     * @property {number} height The image height in pixels.
     * @property {?ReplaceImageMode} replaceMode Specifies how to adjust the image object in case of replacing the selected image.
     */
description: An object containing the information about the base64 encoded *png* image.
name: ImageData

properties.description: The image source in the base64 format.
properties.name: src

properties.description: The image width in pixels.
properties.name: width

properties.description: The image height in pixels.
properties.name: height

properties.description: Specifies how to adjust the image object in case of replacing the selected image.
properties.name: replaceMode

comment:
/**
	 * Specifies how to adjust the image object in case of replacing the selected image.
	 * @typedef {("fill" | "fit" | "original" | "stretch")} ReplaceImageMode
	 */
description: Specifies how to adjust the image object in case of replacing the selected image.
name: ReplaceImageMode

comment:
/**
	 * The plugin object.
     * @typedef {Object} PluginData
     * @property {string} url The URL to plugin config.
     * @property {string} guid The plugin identifier. It must be of the *asc.{UUID}* type.
	 * @property {boolean} canRemoved Specifies if the plugin can be removed (**true**) or not (**false**).
     * @property {object} obj The {@link /plugin/config config} of the installed plugin. The version is taken from the config and compared with the current one to check for updates.
     */
description: The plugin object.
name: PluginData

properties.description: The URL to plugin config.
properties.name: url

properties.description: The plugin identifier. It must be of the *asc.{UUID}* type.
properties.name: guid

properties.description: Specifies if the plugin can be removed (**true**) or not (**false**).
properties.name: canRemoved

properties.description: The {@link /plugin/config config} of the installed plugin. The version is taken from the config and compared with the current one to check for updates.
properties.name: obj

comment:
/**
	 * @typedef {Object} ContextMenuItem
	 * The context menu item.
	 * @property {string} id - The item ID.
	 * @property {localeTranslate} text - The item text.
	 * @property {boolean} [disabled] - Specifies if the current item is disabled or not.
	 * @property {ContextMenuItem[]} items - An array containing the context menu items for the current item.
	 */
name: ContextMenuItem
description: The context menu item.

properties.description: The item ID.
properties.name: id

properties.description: The item text.
properties.name: text

properties.description: Specifies if the current item is disabled or not.
properties.name: disabled

properties.description: An array containing the context menu items for the current item.
properties.name: items
